'''''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 10: Crimson Empire''''' is the tenth of the ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection (comics)|Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' trade paperbacks, released on [[December 5]], [[2007]]. It is a hardcover version of [[Star Wars: Crimson Empire (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Crimson Empire'' trade paperback]].

{{Comics-stub}}
